#' Report Manager Module
2 
#'
3 
#' @details
4 
#' This module supports collaborative work on `teal` reports, generated by `teal.reporter`
5 
#' package. This module extends functionalities of `teal.reporter` and allows to store
6 
#' reports in chosen path. Reports will be stored as JSON files inside folders named after
7 
#' reports.
8 
#'
9 
#' @param reports_path character. Absolute path where reports should be stored.
10 
#' @param auto_save logical. Whether to save active report whenever there are any changes made.
11 
#'
12 
#' @importFrom teal module
13 
#'
14 
#' @examples
15 
#'
16 
#' app <- teal::init(
17 
#'   data = teal.data::teal_data(IRIS = iris),
18 
#'   modules = teal::modules(
19 
#'     teal::example_module(transformators = list(or_filtering_transformator("IRIS"))),
20 
#'     tm_report_manager()
21 
#'   )
22 
#' )
23 
#' if (interactive()) {
24 
#'   shinyApp(app$ui, app$server)
25 
#' }
26 
#' @export
27 
tm_report_manager <- function(
28 
  reports_path = "reports",
29 
  auto_save = TRUE
30 
) {
31 ! 
  module(
32 ! 
    ui = report_manager_ui,
33 ! 
    server = report_manager_server,
34 ! 
    label = "Report Manager",
35 ! 
    server_args = list(
36 ! 
      reports_path = reports_path,
37 ! 
      auto_save = auto_save
38 
    )
39 
  )
40 
}
41 

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' The `UI` of [`tm_report_manager()`]

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @param id (`character`) the id of the module.

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom DT DTOutput

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @import shiny

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
report_manager_ui <- function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    !
                    
                      
  ns <- NS(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
  tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
    tags$style(HTML("

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
      .dt_highlight{ background-color: #eb1700 !important; color: #ffffff !important;}

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
      /* Badge that appears on hover for highlighted rows only */

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
    .current_report_badge {

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
      display: none;

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
      margin-left: 6px;

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
      font-size: 0.75em;

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
      vertical-align: middle;

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
    /* Action buttons spacing */

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
    .dataTables_wrapper .btn {

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    !
                    
                      
      margin-right: 3px;

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
    /* Tooltip styling */

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
    .tooltip {

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
      font-size: 12px;

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
    /* Enable text wrapping in table cells */

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
    table.dataTable td {

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
      white-space: normal;

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
      word-wrap: break-word;

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
    ")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
    fluidRow(

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
      column(4,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
        style = "text-align: left;",

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
        actionButton(ns("show_help"), "Help", icon = icon("question-circle"), class = "btn-info btn-sm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
        actionButton(ns("merge_reports"), "Merge reports"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
        actionButton(ns("create_new_report_btn"), "Create new report", icon = icon("plus"), class = "btn-success")

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    !
                    
                      
    br(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    # List of reports

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    !
                    
                      
    DT::DTOutput(ns("report_list"), width = "75%"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
    tags$script(HTML(paste0("

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    !
                    
                      
    $(document).on('click', '.release-lock-btn', function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    !
                    
                      
      var reportName = $(this).data('report');

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
      Shiny.setInputValue('", ns("release_lock_click"), "', reportName, {priority: 'event'});

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
    });

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
  ")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' The server part of [`tm_report_manager()`].

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams tm_report_manager

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams report_manager_ui

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#' @param reporter the object that holds the report. Provided by `teal`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#' @import shiny teal

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom DT renderDT

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shinyjs toggleState disable enable

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
report_manager_server <- function(id, reports_path = "reports", auto_save = TRUE, reporter) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
  moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    !
                    
                      
    ns <- session$ns

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
    # Initialize shinyjs

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
    shinyjs::useShinyjs()

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
    # Initialize report manager object

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    !
                    
                      
    rm <- ReportManager$new(reports_path = reports_path, session)

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    !
                    
                      
    if (auto_save) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
      rm$auto_save_observer(reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    # reactiveVals

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    !
                    
                      
    delete_candidate <- reactiveVal(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    !
                    
                      
    rebuild_candidate <- reactiveVal(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
    load_candidate <- reactiveVal(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
    edit_candidate <- reactiveVal(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
    release_candidate <- reactiveVal(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    !
                    
                      
    refresh_trigger <- reactiveVal(Sys.time())

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    !
                    
                      
    modal_shown <- reactiveVal(FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    # Helper functions

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
    validate_title <- function(title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    !
                    
                      
      !is.null(title) && nzchar(trimws(title))

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    !
                    
                      
    refresh_ui <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    !
                    
                      
      refresh_trigger(Sys.time())

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    !
                    
                      
      shinyjs::toggleState("merge_reports", condition = !is.null(rm$current_report_title()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    !
                    
                      
    handle_error <- function(action, err) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    !
                    
                      
      showNotification(sprintf("Error %s: %s", action, conditionMessage(err)), type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
    create_action_button <- function(action, report_name, icon, btn_class, title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
      safe_name <- gsub("'", "\\'", report_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    !
                    
                      
      sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
        paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
          '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm %s" onclick="Shiny.setInputValue(\'%s\', \'%s\', ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
          '{priority: \'event\'})" title="%s" data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-%s"></i></button>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    !
                    
                      
        btn_class, ns(action), safe_name, title, icon

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    # Initially disable merge button and trigger initial load

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
    shinyjs::disable("merge_reports")

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
    observe(

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
      {

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
        rm$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
        refresh_trigger(Sys.time())

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
      },

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
      priority = 1000

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
    # Monitor reporter cards for new report creation

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
    observe({

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
      cards_count <- length(reporter$get_cards())

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    !
                    
                      
      current_title <- rm$current_report_title()

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
      # If cards exist but no current report and modal not shown, show modal

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(current_title) && cards_count > 0 && !modal_shown()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    !
                    
                      
        modal_shown(TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    !
                    
                      
        showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    !
                    
                      
          title = "Create New Report",

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    !
                    
                      
          "You are creating a new report. Please enter a report title:",

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    !
                    
                      
          textInput(ns("new_report_title"), "Report title:", value = ""),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    !
                    
                      
          footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
            modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    !
                    
                      
            actionButton(ns("create_new_report"), "Create Report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    !
                    
                      
          easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
        ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
      # Reset flag when no cards

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    !
                    
                      
      if (cards_count == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    !
                    
                      
        modal_shown(FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$create_new_report, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    !
                    
                      
      new_title <- trimws(input$new_report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
      modal_shown(FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(new_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Report title cannot be empty.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
      tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
        {

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    !
                    
                      
          rm$create_new_report(new_title, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    !
                    
                      
          rm$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    !
                    
                      
          refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    !
                    
                      
          showNotification(sprintf("Created new report: %s", new_title), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    !
                    
                      
        error = function(err) handle_error("creating report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
    # Manual create new report button

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$create_new_report_btn, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Create New Report",

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    !
                    
                      
        "Enter a title for the new report. Current report will be saved automatically.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    !
                    
                      
        textInput(ns("manual_new_report_title"), "Report title:", value = ""),

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    !
                    
                      
          modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("confirm_create_new_report"), "Create Report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_create_new_report, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    !
                    
                      
      new_title <- trimws(input$manual_new_report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(new_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Report title cannot be empty.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    !
                    
                      
      tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      
        {

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    !
                    
                      
          rm$create_new_report(new_title, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    !
                    
                      
          rm$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    !
                    
                      
          refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    !
                    
                      
          showNotification(sprintf("Created new report: %s", new_title), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    !
                    
                      
        error = function(err) handle_error("creating report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    
                    
                      
    # Help modal

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$show_help, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Report Permissions",

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    !
                    
                      
        HTML("

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    !
                    
                      
          <h4>Permissions Summary:</h4>

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    !
                    
                      
          <table class='table table-bordered table-sm' style='margin-top: 10px;'>

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    !
                    
                      
            <thead>

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    !
                    
                      
                <th>Action</th>

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    !
                    
                      
                <th>Active Report</th>

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    !
                    
                      
                <th>Your Locked Report</th>

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    !
                    
                      
                <th>Others' Locked Report</th>

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    !
                    
                      
                <th>Unlocked Report</th>

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    !
                    
                      
            </thead>

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    !
                    
                      
            <tbody>

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Edit Title</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #f8d7da;'>No</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #f8d7da;'>No</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Delete</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #f8d7da;'>No</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #f8d7da;'>No</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Rebuild</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Load/View</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #fff3cd;'>Already active</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Full access</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d1ecf1;'>View only</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d1ecf1;'>View only</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Release Lock</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #f8d7da;'>No</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #e2e3e5;'>N/A</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    !
                    
                      
              <tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    !
                    
                      
                <td><strong>Merge</strong></td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes*</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes*</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes*</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    !
                    
                      
                <td style='background-color: #d4edda;'>Yes*</td>

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    !
                    
                      
              </tr>

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    !
                    
                      
            </tbody>

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    !
                    
                      
          </table>

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    !
                    
                      
          <p style='font-size: 0.9em; margin-top: 5px;'>

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    !
                    
                      
            <em>* Merge requires reports to have saved content (cards)</em>

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    !
                    
                      
          </p>

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    
                    
                      
        "),

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    !
                    
                      
        size = "l",

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = modalButton("Close"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    
                    
                      
    # Release lock by clicking on lock icon

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$release_lock_click, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    !
                    
                      
      release_candidate(input$release_lock_click)

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Release Lock",

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    !
                    
                      
        sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    !
                    
                      
          paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    !
                    
                      
            "Are you sure you want to release your lock on '%s'?",

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    !
                    
                      
            "The report will remain loaded but become read-only for you."

                    		
                  

                  

                    326
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    327
                    !
                    
                      
          input$release_lock_click

                    		
                  

                  

                    328
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    329
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    330
                    !
                    
                      
          modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    331
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("confirm_release_lock"), "Yes, release lock")

                    		
                  

                  

                    332
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    333
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    334
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    335
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    336
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    337
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_release_lock, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    338
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    339
                    !
                    
                      
      report_name <- release_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    340
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(report_name)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    341
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No report selected to release lock.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    342
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    343
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    344
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    345
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Releasing lock...", value = 0.3, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    346
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    347
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    348
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$release_lock(report_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    349
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_trigger(Sys.time())

                    		
                  

                  

                    350
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("releasing lock", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.7)

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    
                    
                      
    # Refresh button handler

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$refresh_report_list, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    !
                    
                      
      tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    
                    
                      
        {

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    !
                    
                      
          rm$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    !
                    
                      
          refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    !
                    
                      
          showNotification("Report list refreshed", type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    !
                    
                      
        error = function(err) handle_error("refreshing list", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    !
                    
                      
    output$report_list <- DT::renderDT({

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    
                    
                      
      # Depend on refresh trigger and the current report title to ensure updates

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    !
                    
                      
      refresh_trigger()

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    !
                    
                      
      current_title <- rm$current_report_title()

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    
                    
                      
      # Also depend on the reporter cards to trigger refresh when new cards are added

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    !
                    
                      
      reporter$get_cards()

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    377
                    !
                    
                      
      df <- rm$available_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    378
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    379
                    !
                    
                      
        df <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    380
                    !
                    
                      
          reports = character(0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    381
                    !
                    
                      
          created_by = character(0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    382
                    !
                    
                      
          locked_by = character(0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    383
                    !
                    
                      
          last_rebuild = character(0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    384
                    !
                    
                      
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    385
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    386
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    387
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    388
                    
                    
                      
      # Ensure all required columns exist

                    		
                  

                  

                    389
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!"reports" %in% names(df)) df$reports <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    390
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!"created_by" %in% names(df)) df$created_by <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    391
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!"locked_by" %in% names(df)) df$locked_by <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    392
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!"last_rebuild" %in% names(df)) df$last_rebuild <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    393
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    394
                    
                    
                      
      # Ensure 'reports' is character

                    		
                  

                  

                    395
                    !
                    
                      
      df$reports <- as.character(df$reports)

                    		
                  

                  

                    396
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
      # If current report exists but not in df, add it

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(current_title) && nzchar(as.character(current_title))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    !
                    
                      
        if (length(df$reports) == 0 || !any(df$reports == as.character(current_title))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    !
                    
                      
          user_name <- ifelse(interactive(), Sys.getenv("USER"), session$user)

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is.null(user_name) || user_name == "") user_name <- "Current User"

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    !
                    
                      
          current_locked_by <- if (!is.null(rm$my_locked_report) &&

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$my_locked_report == as.character(current_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    !
                    
                      
            user_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    
                    
                      
          } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    
                    
                      
            ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    !
                    
                      
          new_row <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    !
                    
                      
            reports = as.character(current_title),

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    !
                    
                      
            created_by = user_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    !
                    
                      
            locked_by = current_locked_by,

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    !
                    
                      
            last_rebuild = "Never",

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    !
                    
                      
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    !
                    
                      
          df <- rbind(new_row, df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    
                    
                      
      # Format columns for display

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    !
                    
                      
      df$locked_by <- ifelse(is.na(df$locked_by) | df$locked_by == "", "", as.character(df$locked_by))

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    !
                    
                      
      df$created_by <- ifelse(is.na(df$created_by) | df$created_by == "", "", as.character(df$created_by))

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    !
                    
                      
      df$last_rebuild <- ifelse(is.na(df$last_rebuild) | df$last_rebuild == "", "Never", as.character(df$last_rebuild))

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    
                    
                      
      # Add status HTML column with Active/Locked/Unlocked logic

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    !
                    
                      
      if (nrow(df) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    !
                    
                      
        df$status <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    !
                    
                      
          report_name <- as.character(df$reports[i])

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    !
                    
                      
          locked_by_val <- as.character(df$locked_by[i])

                    		
                  

                  

                    431
                    !
                    
                      
          is_locked <- !is.na(locked_by_val) && nzchar(locked_by_val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    432
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    433
                    !
                    
                      
          if (!is.null(current_title) && identical(report_name, as.character(current_title))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    434
                    !
                    
                      
            '<span class="label label-success">Active</span>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    435
                    !
                    
                      
          } else if (is_locked) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    !
                    
                      
            '<span class="label label-warning">Locked</span>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    437
                    
                    
                      
          } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    438
                    !
                    
                      
            '<span class="label label-default">Unlocked</span>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    439
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    440
                    !
                    
                      
        }, character(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    441
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    442
                    !
                    
                      
        df$status <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    443
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    
                    
                      
      # Add combined Actions column with icons and tooltips

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    !
                    
                      
      if (nrow(df) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    !
                    
                      
        df$actions <- vapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    !
                    
                      
          report_name <- as.character(df$reports[i])

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    !
                    
                      
          locked_by_val <- as.character(df$locked_by[i])

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    !
                    
                      
          is_locked <- !is.na(locked_by_val) && nzchar(locked_by_val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    !
                    
                      
          is_active <- !is.null(current_title) && identical(report_name, as.character(current_title))

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    
                    
                      
          # Lock status icon (first in actions)

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    !
                    
                      
          is_my_lock <- !is.null(rm$my_locked_report) && rm$my_locked_report == report_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is_locked) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    !
                    
                      
            if (is_my_lock) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      
              # Clickable lock for user's own locks

                    		
                  

                  

                    458
                    !
                    
                      
              lock_icon <- sprintf(

                    		
                  

                  

                    459
                    !
                    
                      
                paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    460
