                    !
                    
                      
                  '<i class="fa fa-lock release-lock-btn" style="color: red; ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    461
                    !
                    
                      
                  'margin-right: 8px; cursor: pointer;" title="Click to release your lock" data-report="%s"></i>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    462
                    
                    
                      
                ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    463
                    !
                    
                      
                report_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    464
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    465
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    466
                    
                    
                      
              # Non-clickable lock for others' locks

                    		
                  

                  

                    467
                    !
                    
                      
              lock_icon <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    468
                    !
                    
                      
                '<i class="fa fa-lock" style="color: red; ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    469
                    !
                    
                      
                'margin-right: 8px;" title="Locked by another user"></i>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    472
                    
                    
                      
          } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    473
                    !
                    
                      
            lock_icon <- '<i class="fa fa-unlock" style="color: green; margin-right: 8px;" title="Unlocked"></i>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    474
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    475
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    476
                    
                    
                      
          # Action buttons based on state

                    		
                  

                  

                    477
                    !
                    
                      
          if (is_active) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    478
                    
                    
                      
            # Active report: can edit title, cannot delete, can rebuild

                    		
                  

                  

                    479
                    !
                    
                      
            edit_btn <- create_action_button("edit_row", report_name, "edit", "btn-warning", "Edit report title")

                    		
                  

                  

                    480
                    !
                    
                      
            load_btn <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    481
                    !
                    
                      
              '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    482
                    !
                    
                      
              'disabled title="Already active" data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-check"></i></button>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    483
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    484
                    !
                    
                      
            rebuild_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    485
                    !
                    
                      
              "rebuild_row",

                    		
                  

                  

                    486
                    !
                    
                      
              report_name, "refresh", "btn-primary", "Rebuild report with new data"

                    		
                  

                  

                    487
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    488
                    !
                    
                      
            delete_btn <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    489
                    !
                    
                      
              '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    490
                    !
                    
                      
              'disabled title="Cannot delete active report" data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-ban"></i></button>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    491
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    492
                    !
                    
                      
          } else if (is_locked) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    493
                    !
                    
                      
            if (is_my_lock) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    494
                    
                    
                      
              # My locked report: can edit, load, rebuild, delete

                    		
                  

                  

                    495
                    !
                    
                      
              edit_btn <- create_action_button("edit_row", report_name, "edit", "btn-warning", "Edit report title")

                    		
                  

                  

                    496
                    !
                    
                      
              load_btn <- create_action_button("load_row", report_name, "download", "btn-success", "Load this report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    497
                    !
                    
                      
              rebuild_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    498
                    !
                    
                      
                "rebuild_row", report_name, "refresh", "btn-primary", "Rebuild report with new data"

                    		
                  

                  

                    499
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    500
                    !
                    
                      
              delete_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    501
                    !
                    
                      
                "delete_report", report_name, "trash", "btn-danger", "Delete this report"

                    		
                  

                  

                    502
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    503
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    504
                    
                    
                      
              # Others' locked report: can view and rebuild, cannot edit/delete

                    		
                  

                  

                    505
                    !
                    
                      
              edit_btn <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    506
                    !
                    
                      
                '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    507
                    !
                    
                      
                'disabled title="Report locked by another user" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    508
                    !
                    
                      
                'data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-ban"></i></button>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    509
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    510
                    !
                    
                      
              load_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    511
                    !
                    
                      
                "load_row", report_name, "eye", "btn-info", "View this report (read-only)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    512
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    513
                    !
                    
                      
              rebuild_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    514
                    !
                    
                      
                "rebuild_row", report_name, "refresh", "btn-primary", "Rebuild report with new data"

                    		
                  

                  

                    515
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    516
                    !
                    
                      
              delete_btn <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    517
                    !
                    
                      
                '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    518
                    !
                    
                      
                'disabled title="Report locked by another user" data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-ban"></i>',

                    		
                  

                  

                    519
                    !
                    
                      
                "</button>"

                    		
                  

                  

                    520
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    521
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    522
                    
                    
                      
          } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    523
                    
                    
                      
            # Unlocked report: can view, delete, and rebuild, cannot edit

                    		
                  

                  

                    524
                    !
                    
                      
            edit_btn <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    525
                    !
                    
                      
              '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" ',

                    		
                  

                  

                    526
                    !
                    
                      
              'disabled title="Report is unlocked" data-toggle="tooltip"><i class="fa fa-ban"></i></button>'

                    		
                  

                  

                    527
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    528
                    !
                    
                      
            load_btn <- create_action_button("load_row", report_name, "eye", "btn-info", "View this report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    529
                    !
                    
                      
            rebuild_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    530
                    !
                    
                      
              "rebuild_row", report_name, "refresh", "btn-primary", "Rebuild report with new data"

                    		
                  

                  

                    531
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    532
                    !
                    
                      
            delete_btn <- create_action_button(

                    		
                  

                  

                    533
                    !
                    
                      
              "delete_report", report_name, "trash", "btn-danger", "Delete this report"

                    		
                  

                  

                    534
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    535
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    536
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    537
                    
                    
                      
          # Combine all elements with spacing

                    		
                  

                  

                    538
                    !
                    
                      
          paste(lock_icon, edit_btn, load_btn, rebuild_btn, delete_btn, sep = " ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    539
                    !
                    
                      
        }, character(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    540
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    541
                    !
                    
                      
        df$actions <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    542
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    543
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    544
                    
                    
                      
      # Rename columns for display

                    		
                  

                  

                    545
                    !
                    
                      
      colnames(df) <- c("Report Title", "Created by", "Locked by", "Last Rebuild", "Status", "Actions")

                    		
                  

                  

                    546
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    547
                    
                    
                      
      # Render the datatable

                    		
                  

                  

                    548
                    !
                    
                      
      DT::datatable(

                    		
                  

                  

                    549
                    !
                    
                      
        df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    550
                    !
                    
                      
        escape = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    551
                    !
                    
                      
        selection = "single",

                    		
                  

                  

                    552
                    !
                    
                      
        rownames = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    553
                    !
                    
                      
        options = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    554
                    !
                    
                      
          pageLength = 10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    555
                    !
                    
                      
          autoWidth = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    556
                    !
                    
                      
          searching = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    557
                    !
                    
                      
          lengthChange = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    558
                    !
                    
                      
          initComplete = DT::JS(

                    		
                  

                  

                    559
                    !
                    
                      
            "function(settings, json) {",

                    		
                  

                  

                    560
                    !
                    
                      
            "  $('[data-toggle=\"tooltip\"]').tooltip();",

                    		
                  

                  

                    561
                    
                    
                      
            "}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    562
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    563
                    !
                    
                      
          drawCallback = DT::JS(

                    		
                  

                  

                    564
                    !
                    
                      
            "function(settings) {",

                    		
                  

                  

                    565
                    !
                    
                      
            "  $('[data-toggle=\"tooltip\"]').tooltip();",

                    		
                  

                  

                    566
                    
                    
                      
            "}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    567
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    568
                    !
                    
                      
          rowCallback = DT::JS(

                    		
                  

                  

                    569
                    !
                    
                      
            "function(row, data, index){",

                    		
                  

                  

                    570
                    !
                    
                      
            "  $('[data-toggle=\"tooltip\"]').tooltip();",

                    		
                  

                  

                    571
                    
                    
                      
            "}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    572
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    573
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    574
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    575
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    576
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    577
                    
                    
                      
    # Merge reports button handler

                    		
                  

                  

                    578
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$merge_reports, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    579
                    !
                    
                      
      avail_reports <- rm$available_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    580
                    !
                    
                      
      current <- rm$current_report_title()

                    		
                  

                  

                    581
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    582
                    
                    
                      
      # Filter reports that have Report.json (have content)

                    		
                  

                  

                    583
                    !
                    
                      
      reports_with_content <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    584
                    !
                    
                      
      for (report in avail_reports$reports) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    585
                    !
                    
                      
        report_json <- file.path(rm$get_abs_report_path(report), "Report.json")

                    		
                  

                  

                    586
                    !
                    
                      
        if (file.exists(report_json)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    587
                    !
                    
                      
          reports_with_content <- c(reports_with_content, report)

                    		
                  

                  

                    588
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    589
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    590
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    591
                    !
                    
                      
      if (length(reports_with_content) < 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    592
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Need at least 2 reports with content to merge.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    593
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    594
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    595
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    596
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(

                    		
                  

                  

                    597
                    !
                    
                      
        modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    598
                    !
                    
                      
          title = "Merge Reports",

                    		
                  

                  

                    599
                    !
                    
                      
          checkboxGroupInput(

                    		
                  

                  

                    600
                    !
                    
                      
            inputId = ns("merge_select"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    601
                    !
                    
                      
            label = "Select reports to merge (select 2 or more):",

                    		
                  

                  

                    602
                    !
                    
                      
            choices = reports_with_content,

                    		
                  

                  

                    603
                    !
                    
                      
            selected = if (!is.null(current) && current %in% reports_with_content) current else NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    604
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    605
                    !
                    
                      
          textInput(ns("merged_report_title"), "New merged report title:", value = ""),

                    		
                  

                  

                    606
                    !
                    
                      
          footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    607
                    !
                    
                      
            modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    608
                    !
                    
                      
            actionButton(ns("confirm_merge"), "Merge reports")

                    		
                  

                  

                    609
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    610
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    611
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    612
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    613
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    614
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_merge, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    615
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    616
                    !
                    
                      
      selected_reports <- input$merge_select

                    		
                  

                  

                    617
                    !
                    
                      
      new_title <- trimws(input$merged_report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    618
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    619
                    !
                    
                      
      if (length(selected_reports) < 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    620
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Please select at least 2 reports to merge.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    621
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    622
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    623
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    624
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(new_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    625
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Merged report title cannot be empty.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    626
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    627
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    628
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    629
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Merging reports...", value = 0.3, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    630
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    631
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    632
                    
                    
                      
            # Load first report as base

                    		
                  

                  

                    633
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$load_report(selected_reports[1], reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    634
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    635
                    
                    
                      
            # Merge remaining reports into it

                    		
                  

                  

                    636
                    !
                    
                      
            for (i in 2:length(selected_reports)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    637
                    !
                    
                      
              rm$merge_reports(selected_reports[1], selected_reports[i], reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    638
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    639
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    640
                    
                    
                      
            # Rename to new title

                    		
                  

                  

                    641
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$rename_report(selected_reports[1], new_title, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    642
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    643
                    
                    
                      
            # Delete original reports except the first one (now renamed)

                    		
                  

                  

                    644
                    !
                    
                      
            for (report in selected_reports[-1]) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    645
                    !
                    
                      
              rm$delete_report(report)

                    		
                  

                  

                    646
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    647
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    648
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    649
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(

                    		
                  

                  

                    650
                    !
                    
                      
              sprintf("Successfully merged %d reports into '%s'", length(selected_reports), new_title),

                    		
                  

                  

                    651
                    !
                    
                      
              type = "message"

                    		
                  

                  

                    652
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    653
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    654
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("merging reports", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    655
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    656
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.7)

                    		
                  

                  

                    657
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    658
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    659
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    660
                    
                    
                      
    # ---- Row button handlers (delete / rebuild / load / edit) ----

                    		
                  

                  

                    661
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    662
                    
                    
                      
    # Edit row clicked -> show edit modal

                    		
                  

                  

                    663
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$edit_row, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    664
                    !
                    
                      
      edit_candidate(input$edit_row)

                    		
                  

                  

                    665
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    666
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Edit Report Title",

                    		
                  

                  

                    667
                    !
                    
                      
        textInput(ns("new_report_title"), "New report title:", value = input$edit_row),

                    		
                  

                  

                    668
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    669
                    !
                    
                      
          modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    670
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("confirm_edit"), "Save")

                    		
                  

                  

                    671
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    672
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    673
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    674
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    675
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    676
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_edit, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    677
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    678
                    !
                    
                      
      old_title <- edit_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    679
                    !
                    
                      
      new_title <- trimws(input$new_report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    680
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    681
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(new_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    682
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Report title cannot be empty.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    683
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    684
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    685
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    686
                    !
                    
                      
      if (old_title == new_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    687
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    688
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    689
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    690
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Renaming report...", value = 0.2, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    691
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    692
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    693
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$rename_report(old_title, new_title, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    694
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    695
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(sprintf("Renamed report from '%s' to '%s'", old_title, new_title), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    696
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    697
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("renaming report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    698
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    699
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    700
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    701
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    702
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    703
                    
                    
                      
    # Delete row clicked -> show confirm modal

                    		
                  

                  

                    704
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$delete_report, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    705
                    !
                    
                      
      delete_candidate(input$delete_report)

                    		
                  

                  

                    706
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    707
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Are you sure you want to delete this report?",

                    		
                  

                  

                    708
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    709
                    !
                    
                      
          modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    710
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("final_delete"), "Yes, delete report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    711
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    712
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    713
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    714
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    715
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    716
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$final_delete, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    717
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    718
                    !
                    
                      
      report_name <- delete_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    719
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(report_name)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    720
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No report selected to delete.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    721
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    722
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    723
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    724
                    !
                    
                      
      current_title <- rm$current_report_title()

                    		
                  

                  

                    725
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(current_title) && identical(as.character(report_name), as.character(current_title))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    726
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("Cannot delete the currently active report.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    727
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    728
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    729
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    730
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Deleting report...", value = 0.3, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    731
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    732
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    733
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$delete_report(report_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    734
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    735
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(sprintf("Deleted report: %s", report_name), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    736
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    737
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("deleting report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    738
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    739
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.7)

                    		
                  

                  

                    740
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    741
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    742
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    743
                    
                    
                      
    # Rebuild row clicked -> show confirm modal

                    		
                  

                  

                    744
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$rebuild_row, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    745
                    !
                    
                      
      rebuild_candidate(input$rebuild_row)

                    		
                  

                  

                    746
                    !
                    
                      
      showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    747
                    !
                    
                      
        title = "Are you sure you want to rebuild the report with new data?",

                    		
                  

                  

                    748
                    !
                    
                      
        "Unsaved changes to the report will be lost",

                    		
                  

                  

                    749
                    !
                    
                      
        footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    750
                    !
                    
                      
          modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    751
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("confirm_rebuild"), "Yes, rebuild")

                    		
                  

                  

                    752
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    753
                    !
                    
                      
        easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    754
                    
                    
                      
      ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    755
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    756
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    757
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_rebuild, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    758
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    759
                    !
                    
                      
      report_id <- rebuild_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    760
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(as.character(report_id))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    761
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No report selected to rebuild.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    762
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    763
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    764
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Rebuilding report...", value = 0.2, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    765
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    766
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    767
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$rebuild_report(report_id, rp = reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    768
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    769
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(sprintf("Rebuild started for report: %s", report_id), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    770
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    771
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    772
                    !
                    
                      
            handle_error("rebuilding report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    773
                    !
                    
                      
            message("Rebuild error for report: ", report_id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    774
                    !
                    
                      
            message(conditionMessage(err))

                    		
                  

                  

                    775
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    776
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    777
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    778
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    779
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    780
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    781
                    
                    
                      
    # Load row clicked -> confirm and call load

                    		
                  

                  

                    782
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$load_row, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    783
                    !
                    
                      
      load_candidate(input$load_row)

                    		
                  

                  

                    784
                    !
                    
                      
      report_name <- input$load_row

                    		
                  

                  

                    785
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    786
                    
                    
                      
      # Check if this is a locked report by someone else or unlocked

                    		
                  

                  

                    787
                    !
                    
                      
      avail_reports <- rm$available_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    788
                    !
                    
                      
      report_row <- avail_reports[avail_reports$reports == report_name, ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    789
                    !
                    
                      
      locked_by_val <- if (nrow(report_row) > 0) report_row$locked_by else ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    790
                    !
                    
                      
      is_locked <- !is.na(locked_by_val) && nzchar(locked_by_val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    791
                    !
                    
                      
      is_my_lock <- !is.null(rm$my_locked_report) && rm$my_locked_report == report_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    792
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    793
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is_locked && !is_my_lock) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    794
                    
                    
                      
        # Others' locked report - view only

                    		
                  

                  

                    795
                    !
                    
                      
        showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    796
                    !
                    
                      
          title = "View Report (Read-Only)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    797
                    !
                    
                      
          "This report is locked by another user. You can view it but cannot make changes. Do you want to continue?",

                    		
                  

                  

                    798
                    !
                    
                      
          footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    799
                    !
                    
                      
            modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    800
                    !
                    
                      
            actionButton(ns("confirm_view_report"), "Yes, view report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    801
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    802
                    !
                    
                      
          easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    803
                    
                    
                      
        ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    804
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    805
                    
                    
                      
        # My locked report or can be locked - full access

                    		
                  

                  

                    806
                    !
                    
                      
        showModal(modalDialog(

                    		
                  

                  

                    807
                    !
                    
                      
          title = "Load report",

                    		
                  

                  

                    808
                    !
                    
                      
          "Unsaved changes to the current report will be lost. Do you want to load this report?",

                    		
                  

                  

                    809
                    !
                    
                      
          footer = tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    810
                    !
                    
                      
            modalButton("Cancel"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    811
                    !
                    
                      
            actionButton(ns("confirm_load_row"), "Yes, load report")

                    		
                  

                  

                    812
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    813
                    !
                    
                      
          easyClose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    814
                    
                    
                      
        ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    815
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    816
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    817
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    818
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_view_report, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    819
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    820
                    !
                    
                      
      report_name <- load_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    821
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(report_name)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    822
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No report selected to view.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    823
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    824
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    825
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Loading report (read-only)...", value = 0.2, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    826
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    827
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    828
                    
                    
                      
            # Load report without locking (read-only mode)

                    		
                  

                  

                    829
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$load_report(report_name, reporter, skip_lock = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    830
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    831
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(sprintf("Loaded report in read-only mode: %s", report_name), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    832
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    833
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("loading report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    834
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    835
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    836
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    837
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    838
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    839
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$confirm_load_row, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    840
                    !
                    
                      
      removeModal()

                    		
                  

                  

                    841
                    !
                    
                      
      report_name <- load_candidate()

                    		
                  

                  

                    842
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!validate_title(report_name)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    843
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No report selected to load.", type = "error")

                    		
                  

                  

                    844
                    !
                    
                      
        return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    845
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    846
                    !
                    
                      
      withProgress(message = "Loading report...", value = 0.2, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    847
                    !
                    
                      
        tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    848
                    
                    
                      
          {

                    		
                  

                  

                    849
                    !
                    
                      
            rm$load_report(report_name, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    850
                    !
                    
                      
            refresh_ui()

                    		
                  

                  

                    851
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification(sprintf("Loaded report: %s", report_name), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    852
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    853
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(err) handle_error("loading report", err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    854
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    855
                    !
                    
                      
        incProgress(0.8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    856
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    857
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    858
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    859
                    
                    
                      
    # Insert Refresh button once

                    		
                  

                  

                    860
                    !
                    
                      
    onFlushed(function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    861
                    !
                    
                      
      insertUI(

                    		
                  

                  

                    862
                    !
                    
                      
        selector = "#teal-teal_modules-nav-report_manager-wrapper > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    863
                    !
                    
                      
        where = "afterBegin",

                    		
                  

                  

                    864
                    !
                    
                      
        ui = tags$div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    865
                    !
                    
                      
          id = ns("refresh_report_btn_wrapper"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    866
                    !
                    
                      
          actionButton(ns("refresh_report_list"), "Refresh list", class = "btn-primary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    867
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    868
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    869
                    !
                    
                      
    }, once = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    870
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    871
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Apply Logical AND/OR filter transformations

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' This transformator provides users with flexible, dynamic filtering capabilities for datasets.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'   Each instance of the transformator operates on a **single dataset**.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'   Users can define multiple filter blocks, where:

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   - Conditions within each block are combined with **logical AND**.
