                    435
                    
                    
                      
            # Guard against external uploads overwriting the active report:

                    		
                  

                  

                    436
                    
                    
                      
            # If the reporter's ID no longer matches the current report title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    437
                    
                    
                      
            # it means the reporter was loaded externally (e.g. via teal.reporter upload).

                    		
                  

                  

                    438
                    
                    
                      
            # Reset the ReportManager to prevent saving uploaded content over the active report.

                    		
                  

                  

                    439
                    !
                    
                      
            reporter_id <- reporter$get_id()

                    		
                  

                  

                    440
                    !
                    
                      
            if (!identical(reporter_id, current_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    441
                    !
                    
                      
              self$reset()

                    		
                  

                  

                    442
                    !
                    
                      
              return()

                    		
                  

                  

                    443
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    444
                    !
                    
                      
            print("Report updated. Saving changes.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    445
                    !
                    
                      
            withProgress(message = "Saving report...", value = 0.3, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    446
                    !
                    
                      
              self$save_report_files(current_title, reporter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    447
                    !
                    
                      
              incProgress(0.7)

                    		
                  

                  

                    448
                    
                    
                      
            })

                    		
                  

                  

                    449
                    !
                    
                      
          } else if (!is.null(current_title) && cards_count > 0 && is_read_only) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    450
                    
                    
                      
            # Show warning if trying to modify read-only report

                    		
                  

                  

                    451
                    !
                    
                      
            showNotification("This report is in read-only mode. Changes cannot be saved.", type = "warning")

                    		
                  

                  

                    452
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    453
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    454
                    !
                    
                      
        ignoreInit = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    455
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    456
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    457
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    458
                    
                    
                      
    #' Unlock a locked report

                    		
                  

                  

                    459
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param report_title (character) Title of the report to unlock

                    		
                  

                  

                    460
                    
                    
                      
    unlock_report_public = function(report_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    461
                    !
                    
                      
      if (self$is_locked_by_other(report_title, verbose = FALSE)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    462
                    !
                    
                      
        private$unlock_report(report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    463
                    !
                    
                      
        self$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    464
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification(paste("Unlocked report:", report_title), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    465
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    466
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification(paste("Report is not locked:", report_title), type = "warning")

                    		
                  

                  

                    467
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    468
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    469
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    470
                    
                    
                      
    #' Release lock on current report (keep report loaded but make it read-only)

                    		
                  

                  

                    471
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param report_title (character) Title of the report to release lock from

                    		
                  

                  

                    472
                    
                    
                      
    release_lock = function(report_title = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    473
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(report_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    474
                    !
                    
                      
        report_title <- self$current_report_title()

                    		
                  

                  

                    475
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    476
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    477
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(report_title) && !is.null(self$my_locked_report) &&

                    		
                  

                  

                    478
                    !
                    
                      
        self$my_locked_report == report_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    479
                    !
                    
                      
        private$unlock_report(report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    480
                    !
                    
                      
        self$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    481
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification(paste("Released lock on report:", report_title, "(now read-only)"), type = "message")

                    		
                  

                  

                    482
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    483
                    !
                    
                      
        showNotification("No locked report to release", type = "warning")

                    		
                  

                  

                    484
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    485
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    486
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    487
                    
                    
                      
    #' Re-build reports

                    		
                  

                  

                    488
                    
                    
                      
    #' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    489
                    
                    
                      
    #' Rebuild reports to include data that has changed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    490
                    
                    
                      
    #' This will replace loaded report cards with new cards, that were rebuilt from

                    		
                  

                  

                    491
                    
                    
                      
    #' a code used to generate these cards.

                    		
                  

                  

                    492
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param report_title (character) A title for the saved report.

                    		
                  

                  

                    493
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param rp (Reporter) A reporter object passed from `teal::init`

                    		
                  

                  

                    494
                    
                    
                      
    rebuild_report = function(report_title, rp) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    495
                    !
                    
                      
      reporter <- teal.reporter::Reporter$new()

                    		
                  

                  

                    496
                    !
                    
                      
      report_dir <- self$get_abs_report_path(report_title)

                    		
                  

                  

                    497
                    !
                    
                      
      report_id <- jsonlite::read_json(file.path(report_dir, "Report.json"))$id

                    		
                  

                  

                    498
                    !
                    
                      
      reporter$set_id(as.character(report_id))

                    		
                  

                  

                    499
                    !
                    
                      
      reporter$from_jsondir(report_dir)

                    		
                  

                  

                    500
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    501
                    !
                    
                      
      cards <- reporter$get_cards()

                    		
                  

                  

                    502
                    !
                    
                      
      code_file <- file.path(report_dir, "code.rds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    503
                    !
                    
                      
      card_codes <- if (file.exists(code_file)) readRDS(code_file) else list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    504
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    505
                    !
                    
                      
      for (i in seq_along(cards)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    506
                    !
                    
                      
        card_name <- names(cards)[[i]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    507
                    !
                    
                      
        card <- cards[[i]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    508
                    !
                    
                      
        card_code <- if (i <= length(card_codes)) card_codes[[i]] else card[[length(card)]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    509
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    510
                    
                    
                      
        # Remove teal's internal data-setup lines that can't be re-evaluated

                    		
                  

                  

                    511
                    !
                    
                      
        code_lines <- strsplit(card_code, "\n")[[1]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    512
                    !
                    
                      
        cleaned_lines <- code_lines[

                    		
                  

                  

                    513
                    !
                    
                      
          !grepl("^\\s*(stopifnot|lockEnvironment)\\(", code_lines) &

                    		
                  

                  

                    514
                    !
                    
                      
            !grepl("#\\s*@linksto\\b", code_lines) &

                    		
                  

                  

                    515
                    !
                    
                      
            !grepl("\\.raw_data", code_lines) &

                    		
                  

                  

                    516
                    !
                    
                      
            !grepl("\\[\\]", code_lines)

                    		
                  

                  

                    517
                    
                    
                      
        ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    518
                    !
                    
                      
        cleaned <- paste(cleaned_lines, collapse = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    519
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    520
                    !
                    
                      
        output <- tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    521
                    !
                    
                      
          eval(parse(text = cleaned)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    522
                    !
                    
                      
          error = function(e) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    523
                    !
                    
                      
            warning(sprintf("Failed to rebuild card '%s': %s", card_name, e$message))

                    		
                  

                  

                    524
                    !
                    
                      
            NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    525
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    526
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    527
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    528
                    !
                    
                      
        if (!is.null(output)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    529
                    !
                    
                      
          idx <- which(

                    		
                  

                  

                    530
                    !
                    
                      
            vapply(card, function(x) inherits(x, c("TableTree", "recordedplot", "chunk_output")), logical(1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    531
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    532
                    !
                    
                      
          if (length(idx) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    533
                    !
                    
                      
            card[[idx[1]]] <- output

                    		
                  

                  

                    534
                    !
                    
                      
            reporter$replace_card(card = teal_card(card), card_id = card_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    535
                    !
                    
                      
            reporter$to_jsondir(report_dir)

                    		
                  

                  

                    536
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    537
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    538
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    539
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    540
                    
                    
                      
      # Save rebuild timestamp

                    		
                  

                  

                    541
                    !
                    
                      
      saveRDS(Sys.time(), private$get_metadata_path(report_title, ".rebuild_time.rds"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    542
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    543
                    
                    
                      
      # Reload rebuilt report if it's the same as the one loaded.

                    		
                  

                  

                    544
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(self$current_report_title()) && report_title == self$current_report_title()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    545
                    !
                    
                      
        self$load_report(report_title, rp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    546
                    !
                    
                      
        print("Current report loaded")

                    		
                  

                  

                    547
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    548
                    !
                    
                      
      print(paste0(report_title, ": Rebuild done"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    549
                    !
                    
                      
      self$list_reports()

                    		
                  

                  

                    550
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    551
                    
                    
                      
  ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    552
                    
                    
                      
  private = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    553
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get current user name

                    		
                  

                  

                    554
                    
                    
                      
    get_user_name = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    555
                    !
                    
                      
      user_name <- ifelse(interactive(), Sys.getenv("USER"), self$session$user)

                    		
                  

                  

                    556
                    !
                    
                      
      if (is.null(user_name) || user_name == "") user_name <- "Current User"

                    		
                  

                  

                    557
                    !
                    
                      
      user_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    558
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    559
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    560
                    
                    
                      
    #' Get metadata file path

                    		
                  

                  

                    561
                    
                    
                      
    get_metadata_path = function(report_title, filename) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    562
                    !
                    
                      
      file.path(self$get_abs_report_path(report_title), filename)

                    		
                  

                  

                    563
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    564
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    565
                    
                    
                      
    #' Lock report so that it can't be overwritten by another user

                    		
                  

                  

                    566
                    
                    
                      
    lock_report = function(report_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    567
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!self$is_locked_by_other(report_title)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    568
                    !
                    
                      
        self$my_locked_report <- report_title

                    		
                  

                  

                    569
                    !
                    
                      
        saveRDS(

                    		
                  

                  

                    570
                    !
                    
                      
          object = private$get_user_name(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    571
                    !
                    
                      
          file = private$get_metadata_path(report_title, ".lockfile.rds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    572
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    573
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    574
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    575
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    576
                    
                    
                      
    #' Unlock report

                    		
                  

                  

                    577
                    
                    
                      
    unlock_report = function(report_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    578
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(report_title) & dir.exists(self$get_abs_report_path(report_title))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    579
                    !
                    
                      
        file.remove(private$get_metadata_path(report_title, ".lockfile.rds"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    580
                    !
                    
                      
        self$my_locked_report <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    581
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    582
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    583
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    584
                    
                    
                      
    #' Save creator information

                    		
                  

                  

                    585
                    
                    
                      
    save_creator = function(report_title) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    586
                    !
                    
                      
      creator_file <- private$get_metadata_path(report_title, ".creator.rds")

                    		
                  

                  

                    587
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!file.exists(creator_file)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    588
                    !
                    
                      
        saveRDS(object = private$get_user_name(), file = creator_file)

                    		
                  

                  

                    589
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    590
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    591
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    592
                    
                    
                      
    #' Save code from each card as `code.rds` in the report directory.

                    		
                  

                  

                    593
                    
                    
                      
    save_card_codes = function(reporter, path) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    594
                    !
                    
                      
      cards <- reporter$get_cards()

                    		
                  

                  

                    595
                    !
                    
                      
      code_list <- lapply(cards, function(card) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    596
                    !
                    
                      
        idx <- which(vapply(card, function(x) inherits(x, "code_chunk"), logical(1)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    597
                    !
                    
                      
        if (length(idx) > 0) paste(vapply(card[idx], as.character, character(1)), collapse = "\n") else NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    598
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    599
                    !
                    
                      
      saveRDS(unname(code_list), file.path(path, "code.rds"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    600
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    601
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    602
                    
                    
                      
    #' Register `onSessionEnded` to unlock report when session is closed

                    		
                  

                  

                    603
                    
                    
                      
    register_cleanup = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    604
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(self$session)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    605
                    !
                    
                      
        self$session$onSessionEnded(function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    606
                    !
                    
                      
          private$unlock_report(self$my_locked_report)

                    		
                  

                  

                    607
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    608
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    609
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    610
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    611
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# TransformationManager R6 Class for managing the transformation objects

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
# @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
TransformationManager <- R6::R6Class( # nolint: object_name_linter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
  "TransformationManager",

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
  public = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
    counter = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
    active_ids = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
    predefined = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
    initialized = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
    initialize = function(predefined = list()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    !
                    
                      
      self$active_ids <- reactiveVal(integer(0))

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    !
                    
                      
      self$predefined <- predefined

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
    add_id = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    !
                    
                      
      self$counter <- self$counter + 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    !
                    
                      
      self$active_ids(c(self$active_ids(), self$counter))

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    !
                    
                      
      self$counter

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
    remove_id = function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    !
                    
                      
      self$active_ids(setdiff(self$active_ids(), id))

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
    reset = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
      self$active_ids(integer(0))

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    !
                    
                      
      self$counter <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    !
                    
                      
      self$initialized <- FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' UI design of the transformator

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param id (`character(1)`) the id of the module.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
merge_level_transformer_ui <- function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
  ns <- NS(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
  tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
    shinyjs::useShinyjs(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
    tags$div(id = ns("transformation_container")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
    hr(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
    actionButton(ns("add"), "Add", class = "btn-primary"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
    actionButton(ns("apply"), "Apply", class = "btn-success"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
    actionButton(ns("reset_all"), "Reset", class = "btn-danger")

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
# Server part of transformator

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
merge_level_transformer_srv <- function(id, data, manager, dataname) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
  moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
    ns <- session$ns

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
    trigger <- reactiveVal(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
    create_levels_output <- function(idx, var_sel, lev_sel) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
      force(idx)

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
      force(var_sel)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
      force(lev_sel)

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
      renderUI({

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
        req(input[[paste0("col_name_", idx)]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
        col_data <- data()[[dataname]][[input[[paste0("col_name_", idx)]]]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
        choices <- if (is.factor(col_data)) levels(col_data) else unique(col_data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
        selectInput(

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
          ns(paste0("levs_", idx)), "Levels to Update",

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
          choices = choices, multiple = TRUE, selected = lev_sel

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
    add_container_row <- function(idx, var_sel = NULL, lev_sel = NULL, new_name = "") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
      row_id <- ns(paste0("row_", idx))

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    !
                    
                      
      body_id <- ns(paste0("body_", idx))

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
      toggle_btn_id <- ns(paste0("toggle_", idx))

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
      del_btn_id <- ns(paste0("del_", idx))

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
      insertUI(

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
        selector = paste0("#", ns("transformation_container")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
        ui = tags$div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
          id = row_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
          class = "well well-sm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
          style = "border-left: 5px solid #008080; margin-bottom: 10px;",

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
          div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
            style = "display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;",

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
            tags$strong(paste("Transformation", idx)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
            div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    !
                    
                      
              actionButton(toggle_btn_id, "", icon = icon("minus"), class = "btn-xs"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    !
                    
                      
              actionButton(del_btn_id, "", icon = icon("times"), class = "btn-danger btn-xs")

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    !
                    
                      
          div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    !
                    
                      
            id = body_id,

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    !
                    
                      
            style = "margin-top: 10px;",

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    !
                    
                      
            selectInput(

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
              ns(paste0("col_name_", idx)), "Variable",

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    !
                    
                      
              choices = names(data()[[dataname]]), selected = var_sel

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
            ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    !
                    
                      
            uiOutput(ns(paste0("col_levels_ui_", idx))),

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    !
                    
                      
            textInput(ns(paste0("new_label_", idx)), "New Level Name", value = new_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
          ## Javascript for toggle effect

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    !
                    
                      
          tags$script(sprintf("

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    !
                    
                      
                        $('#%s').on('click',function(){

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    !
                    
                      
                        $('#%s').slideToggle();

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
                        $(this).find('i').toggleClass('fa-minus fa-plus');

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
                        });

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
                      ", toggle_btn_id, body_id))

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
      output[[paste0("col_levels_ui_", idx)]] <- create_levels_output(idx, var_sel, lev_sel)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    !
                    
                      
      observeEvent(input[[paste0("del_", idx)]], {

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    !
                    
                      
        removeUI(selector = paste0("#", row_id))

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
        manager$remove_id(idx)

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
        trigger(trigger() + 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$add, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
      add_container_row(manager$add_id())

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    !
                    
                      
    observe({

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    !
                    
                      
      req(data())

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
      if (!manager$initialized && length(manager$predefined) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
        for (item in manager$predefined) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
          idx <- manager$add_id()

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    !
                    
                      
          add_container_row(idx, var_sel = item[[1]], lev_sel = item[[2]], new_name = item[[3]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    !
                    
                      
        manager$initialized <- TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
        trigger(trigger() + 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$reset_all, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    !
                    
                      
      for (idx in manager$active_ids()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    !
                    
                      
        removeUI(selector = paste0("#", ns(paste0("row_", idx))))

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    !
                    
                      
      manager$reset()

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    !
                    
                      
      trigger(trigger() + 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    !
                    
                      
    observeEvent(input$apply, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    !
                    
                      
      trigger(trigger() + 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    # generate code dynamically based on the input change & number of items from mapping:

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
    data_update <- eventReactive(trigger(), {

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
      final <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
      data_list <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    !
                    
                      
      ids <- manager$active_ids()

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    !
                    
                      
      for (idx in ids) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    !
                    
                      
        col_name <- input[[paste0("col_name_", idx)]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    !
                    
                      
        col_levels <- input[[paste0("levs_", idx)]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
        col_merged_name <- input[[paste0("new_label_", idx)]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
        if (!is.null(col_name) && length(col_levels) > 0 && col_merged_name != "") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    !
                    
                      
          data_list <- teal.modules.clinical::add_expr(data_list, {

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
            substitute(

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
              expr = {

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
                dataname[[col_name]] <- as.character(dataname[[col_name]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
                dataname[[col_name]] <- ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
                  dataname[[col_name]] %in% col_levels, col_merged_name, dataname[[col_name]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
                )

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
                dataname[[col_name]] <- as.factor(dataname[[col_name]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
              env = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    !
                    
                      
                dataname = as.name(dataname),

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
                col_name = col_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    !
                    
                      
                col_levels = col_levels,

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
                col_merged_name = col_merged_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
          })

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
      final$data <- teal.modules.clinical::bracket_expr(data_list)

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    !
                    
                      
      final

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
    # Merge the selected levels into one

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    !
                    
                      
    reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    !
                    
                      
      teal.code::eval_code(data(), as.expression(data_update()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
    })

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
#' Combine levels of a variable into one level

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
#' This transformator allows the user to select a column from the dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
#' and merge levels of this column into a new level. Only selected

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
#' levels are affected.

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dataname (`character(1)`) the name of the dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
#' which columns will be used for possible transformation.

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
#' @param predefined (`list`) the list which has variable name, levels and new label

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom teal teal_transform_module

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny NS tagList actionButton hr div tags uiOutput renderUI req

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny selectInput textInput moduleServer reactiveVal observeEvent observe eventReactive reactive

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shinyWidgets pickerInput

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom teal.code eval_code

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom teal.modules.clinical add_expr bracket_expr

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
#' @return `teal::teal_transform_module`

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
#' app <- teal::init(

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = teal.data::teal_data(IRIS = iris, code = "IRIS <- iris"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
#'   modules = teal::modules(

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
#'     teal::example_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
#'       transformators = list(merge_levels_transformator(

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
#'         dataname = "IRIS",

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
#'         predefined = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
#'           list("Species", "setosa", "SETOSA_WITHIN_FIX"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
#'           list("Petal.Width", c(0.2, 0.3, 0.5), 12)

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
#'         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
#'       ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
#' if (interactive()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
#'   shiny::shinyApp(app$ui, app$server)

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
merge_levels_transformator <- function(dataname, predefined = list()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    !
                    
                      
  teal_transform_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    !
                    
                      
    label = paste("Merge Levels for :", dataname),

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    !
                    
                      
    ui = merge_level_transformer_ui,

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    !
                    
                      
    server = function(id, data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    !
                    
                      
      manager <- TransformationManager$new(predefined = predefined)

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    !
                    
                      
      merge_level_transformer_srv(id, data, manager, dataname)

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Change X-axis scaling decorator for [`teal.modules.clinical::tm_g_forest_rsp`].

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A function to create a UI component for selecting a transform function

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
