                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
          data2 <- data1

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
          if (input$plot_footnote != "") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
            data2 <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
              data1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
                output_name <- output_name + patchwork::plot_annotation(caption = plot_footnote)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
              plot_footnote = input$plot_footnote

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
          within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
            data2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
            {

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
            },

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
            output_name = as.name(output_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' View model for [or_filtering_transformator()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom R6 R6Class

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
filtering_transformator_model <- R6::R6Class("filtering_transformator_model",

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
  public = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field block_objects Block objects.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
    block_objects = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field r_vals Reactive values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
    r_vals = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field alt_id The id of the last alternative.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
    alt_id = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field block_conditions Conditions as strings.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
    block_conditions = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field choices_for_columns Choices for the columns.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
    choices_for_columns = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field final_filter_expr Final filtering expression.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
    final_filter_expr = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
    #' @field final_exp Final expression for `teal.data`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
    final_exp = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
    #' Initializes the object

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param data the reactive data object from `teal`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param dataname `character(1)` the name of the dataset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
    #' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
    initialize = function(data, dataname) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    !
                    
                      
      self$block_objects <- shiny::reactiveVal(list())

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    !
                    
                      
      self$r_vals <- shiny::reactiveValues(filter_conditions = list())

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
      self$alt_id <- shiny::reactiveVal(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
      self$block_conditions <- shiny::reactiveValues()

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    !
                    
                      
      self$choices_for_columns <- shiny::reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    !
                    
                      
        shiny::req(data())

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    !
                    
                      
        names(data()[[dataname]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    !
                    
                      
      self$final_filter_expr <- reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
        blocks <- self$block_objects()

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
        exprs <- Filter(\(block) length(block@conditions) > 0, self$block_objects()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
          (\(blocks) Map(\(block) get_str_expression(block, dataname, data), blocks))()

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
        paste(paste(exprs, collapse = " | "))

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
      self$final_exp <- shiny::reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
        filter_expr <- self$final_filter_expr()

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
        expression <- gsub("\\(\\)", "", filter_expr)

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
        expr <- paste(gsub("\\s*\\|\\s*$", "", expression))

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
        paste(gsub("^\\s*[|&]+\\s*", "", expr))

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
    #' Adds an alternative

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return invisibly self.

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
    #' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
    add_alternative = function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
      self$alt_id(self$alt_id() + 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
      new_block <- methods::new("BlockConditions", conditions = list())

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
      blocks <- self$block_objects()

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
      blocks[[paste0("block_", self$alt_id())]] <- new_block

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
      self$block_objects(blocks)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
      invisible(self)

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
    #' Checks for duplicate conditions

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param cond_str `character(1)` added condition.

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
    #' @param block_cond_list `character(1)` list of all conditions.

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
    #' @return `logical(1)` whether the added condition is a duplicate.

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    #' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
    is_duplicate_condition = function(cond_str, block_cond_list) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
      cond_str %in% block_cond_list

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
  ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  private = list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
)

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Title and Footer Decorator

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A function to create a UI component for selecting a title and footer

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' for tables or plots. It reads title information from a specified Excel

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' file and allows users to choose a title from the provided options.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' It also provides user with flexibility to customize the title and footer

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' according to their specific needs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param output_name (`character(1)`) a name for the output object (e.g., a plot or table).

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param titles_file (`character(1)`) the path to an Excel file containing title and footer

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' information. The function expects the titles to be in the first sheet

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' named `Sheet1`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param choices (`character`) an array of titles and footers, which are available for

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' selection. Default `NULL`, indicates all titles and footers are available.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param selected (`character(1)`) the selected title or footer. Default `NULL`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' indicates no title or footer is selected.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @return [`teal::teal_transform_module()`]

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @details The module creates a UI with a dropdown for selecting a title.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' Once a title is selected, it updates the output by either adding titles to

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' a table or modifying a plot's title and caption accordingly.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' Additionally, it includes a checkbox that user can check to enable

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' customization, allowing them to enter their own values for the title and

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' footer in the designated input fields.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @seealso For the exact Excel workbook layout expected by this function, see the package vignette:

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' `vignette("title-footer-decorator-excel-structure", package = "uteals")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom openxlsx read.xlsx

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom ggplotify as.ggplot

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom ggplot2 labs theme element_text

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom patchwork plot_annotation

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom teal teal_transform_module

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny NS tagList div selectInput checkboxInput uiOutput renderUI textInput moduleServer reactive req

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom grDevices graphics.off

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' library(openxlsx)

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' library(teal.modules.general)

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' example_excel <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   `TABLE ID` = c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'     "DO_NOT_DELETE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'     "TSFAE01A", "TSFAE01A", "TSFAE01A",

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'     "TSFAE01B", "TSFAE01B"

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   IDENTIFIER = c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'     "DO_NOT_DELETE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'     "TITLE", "FOOTNOTE1", "FOOTNOTE2",

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'     "TITLE", "FOOTNOTE1"

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'   TEXT = c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'     "DO_NOT_DELETE",

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'     "Adverse Events Summary A", "Source: Clinical Study Report", "Confidential",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'     "Adverse Events Summary B", "Draft Version"

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   stringsAsFactors = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'   check.names = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#' temp_titles <- tempfile(fileext = ".xlsx")

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' write.xlsx(example_excel, temp_titles, sheetName = "Sheet1", asTable = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' plot_module <- tm_g_scatterplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'   label = "Scatter Plot",

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   x = data_extract_spec(

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'     dataname = "IRIS",

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'     select = select_spec(

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#'       choices = variable_choices(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'         "IRIS", c("Sepal.Length", "Sepal.Width")

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'       ), selected = "Sepal.Length"

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#'   y = data_extract_spec(

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#'     dataname = "IRIS",

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#'     select = select_spec(

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'       choices = variable_choices(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'         "IRIS", c("Petal.Length", "Petal.Width")

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'       ), selected = "Petal.Length"

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#'   decorators = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'     plot = title_footer_decorator(

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#'       "plot", temp_titles,

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'       choices = c("TSFAE01A", "TSFAE01B"), selected = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#' # Initialize the teal app

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#' app <- init(

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = teal_data(IRIS = iris),

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#'   modules = list(plot_module)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' # Run the app

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' if (interactive()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#'   shinyApp(app$ui, app$server)

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
title_footer_decorator <- function(output_name, titles_file, choices = NULL, selected = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_string(output_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_string(titles_file)

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_character(choices, null.ok = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_string(selected, null.ok = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    !
                    
                      
  titles <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(titles_file, "Sheet1")

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    !
                    
                      
  titles$TABLE.ID[1] <- "blank"

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    !
                    
                      
  choices <- `if`(is.null(choices), unique(titles$TABLE.ID), intersect(choices, titles$TABLE.ID))

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    !
                    
                      
    checkmate::check_null(selected),

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    !
                    
                      
    \() `if`(selected %in% choices, TRUE, "selected must be one of the choices")

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
  teal::teal_transform_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
    label = "Title and footer decorator",

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    !
                    
                      
    ui = function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    !
                    
                      
      ns <- NS(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    !
                    
                      
      tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    !
                    
                      
        div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    !
                    
                      
          selectInput(ns("selectTitle"), label = "Select Title", choices = choices, selected = selected),

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    !
                    
                      
          checkboxInput(ns("customize"), label = "Customize Title and Footer", value = FALSE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    !
                    
                      
          uiOutput(ns("customInputs"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    !
                    
                      
    server = function(id, data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
      moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
        # Render UI for custom title and footer when checkbox is checked

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    !
                    
                      
        output$customInputs <- renderUI({

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    !
                    
                      
          if (input$customize) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    !
                    
                      
            tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    !
                    
                      
              textInput(session$ns("customTitle"), label = "Custom Title", value = ""),

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    !
                    
                      
              textInput(session$ns("customFooter"), label = "Custom Footer", value = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    !
                    
                      
        reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    !
                    
                      
          req(data())

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    !
                    
                      
          res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    !
                    
                      
            data(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
            {

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    !
                    
                      
              grDevices::graphics.off()

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_footers <- list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_footers$title <- ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_footers$main_footer <- ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
            },

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    !
                    
                      
            titles_file = titles_file,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    !
                    
                      
            output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    !
                    
                      
            output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
            selectTitle = input$selectTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
            customize = input$customize,

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
            customTitle = input$customTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    !
                    
                      
            customFooter = input$customFooter

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
          # Determine the title and footer

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
          if (input$customize) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
            res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    !
                    
                      
              res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
                titles_footers$title <- if (!is.null(customTitle)) customTitle else "default"

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
                titles_footers$main_footer <- if (!is.null(customFooter)) customFooter else "default"

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_file = titles_file,

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
              output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
              selectTitle = input$selectTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    !
                    
                      
              customize = input$customize,

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    !
                    
                      
              customTitle = input$customTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    !
                    
                      
              customFooter = input$customFooter

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    !
                    
                      
          } else if (input$selectTitle != "blank") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    !
                    
                      
            res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    !
                    
                      
              res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    !
                    
                      
                titles_footers <- junco::get_titles_from_file(selectTitle, file = titles_file)

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_file = titles_file,

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    !
                    
                      
              output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    !
                    
                      
              selectTitle = input$selectTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    !
                    
                      
              customize = input$customize,

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    !
                    
                      
              customTitle = input$customTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    !
                    
                      
              customFooter = input$customFooter

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    !
                    
                      
          if (output_name == "table") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    !
                    
                      
            res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
              res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    !
                    
                      
                output_name <- junco::set_titles(output_name, titles_footers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_file = titles_file,

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    !
                    
                      
              output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
              selectTitle = input$selectTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    !
                    
                      
              customize = input$customize,

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    !
                    
                      
              customTitle = input$customTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    !
                    
                      
              customFooter = input$customFooter

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
          } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    !
                    
                      
            res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    !
                    
                      
              res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    !
                    
                      
                if (length(titles_footers$main_footer) > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    !
                    
                      
                  titles_footers$main_footer <- paste(titles_footers$main_footer, collapse = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
                }

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    !
                    
                      
                if ((inherits(output_name, "ggplot")) && (inherits(output_name, "patchwork"))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    !
                    
                      
                  output_name <- output_name +

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    !
                    
                      
                    patchwork::plot_annotation(title = titles_footers$title, caption = titles_footers$main_footer)

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    !
                    
                      
                } else if ((inherits(output_name, "ggplot")) && !(inherits(output_name, "patchwork"))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    !
                    
                      
                  output_name <- output_name +

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    !
                    
                      
                    ggplot2::labs(title = titles_footers$title, caption = titles_footers$main_footer) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    !
                    
                      
                    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0))

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    !
                    
                      
                } else if ((inherits(output_name, "trellis")) || (inherits(output_name, "grob"))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    !
                    
                      
                  output_name <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(output_name) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    !
                    
                      
                    ggplot2::labs(title = titles_footers$title, caption = titles_footers$main_footer) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    !
                    
                      
                    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0))

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
                } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    !
                    
                      
                  output_name <- output_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
                }

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    !
                    
                      
              titles_file = titles_file,

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    !
                    
                      
              output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    !
                    
                      
              selectTitle = input$selectTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    !
                    
                      
              customize = input$customize,

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    !
                    
                      
              customTitle = input$customTitle,

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    !
                    
                      
              customFooter = input$customFooter

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Extract Non-Parent Module Labels to `YAML`

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Extracts module labels from a teal modules object, filters out parent modules

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' (grouping containers), and generates a `YAML` file with the functional modules.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param mods (`teal_module` or `teal_modules`) a teal modules object

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   containing the module structure.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param filepath (`character(1)`) character string specifying the output `YAML` file path.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param verbose (`logical(1)`) whether to print informational messages. Default is `FALSE`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @return Character vector of non-parent module labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom yaml as.yaml

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' # Extract modules from mods object to YAML file

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' mods <- teal::modules(

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   teal::example_module("mod1"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   teal::example_module("mod2")

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' labels <- extract_modules_to_yaml(mods, "panel_str_modules.yml")

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' unlink("panel_str_modules.yml")

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' # Clean up

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' if (file.exists("panel_str_modules.yml")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   file.remove("panel_str_modules.yml")

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
extract_modules_to_yaml <- function(mods, filepath, verbose = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
  # Recursively extract module labels, excluding parent containers

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    !
                    
                      
  extract_labels <- function(mod_obj) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
    labels <- character(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
    if (inherits(mod_obj, "teal_module")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
      # This is a leaf module - extract its label

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
      return(mod_obj$label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
    } else if (inherits(mod_obj, "teal_modules")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
      # This is a container - recurse into children

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
      for (child in mod_obj$children) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
        labels <- c(labels, extract_labels(child))

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
    labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  # Extract all non-parent module labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
  non_parent_labels <- extract_labels(mods)

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
  # Create panel_str structure

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
  panel_str <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
    list(access_panel = "ADMIN"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
      access_panel = "Modules",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
      access_units = lapply(non_parent_labels, function(label) list(unit = label))

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
  # Write to YAML file

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
  writeLines(yaml::as.yaml(list(panel_str = panel_str)), filepath)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
  if (verbose) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    !
                    
                      
    message("Generated ", filepath, " with ", length(non_parent_labels), " non-parent module labels")

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
  non_parent_labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#' Filter Teal Modules by Label

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#' Recursively filters a teal modules object to keep only modules whose labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#' match the specified labels. Removes modules that don't match and empty

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#' parent containers.

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`teal_module` or `teal_modules`) the object to filter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label (`character(1)`) character vector of module labels to keep.

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' @return Filtered `teal_modules` or `teal_module` object, or `NULL` if none matches.

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom checkmate assert_multi_class

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' # Keep only specific modules by label

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#' mods <- teal::modules(

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#'   teal::example_module("mod1"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
