          data12 <- data11

                    		
                  

                  

                    351
                    !
                    
                      
          if ("font_size_axis_text" %in% to_render) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    352
                    !
                    
                      
            if (!is.null(input$font_size_axis_text) && input$font_size_axis_text != "") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    353
                    !
                    
                      
              data12 <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    354
                    !
                    
                      
                data11,

                    		
                  

                  

                    355
                    
                    
                      
                {

                    		
                  

                  

                    356
                    !
                    
                      
                  output_name <- output_name +

                    		
                  

                  

                    357
                    !
                    
                      
                    ggplot2::theme(axis.text = element_text(size = as.numeric(font_size_axis_text)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    358
                    
                    
                      
                },

                    		
                  

                  

                    359
                    !
                    
                      
                output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    360
                    !
                    
                      
                font_size_axis_text = input$font_size_axis_text

                    		
                  

                  

                    361
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    362
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    363
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    364
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    365
                    !
                    
                      
          within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    366
                    !
                    
                      
            data12,

                    		
                  

                  

                    367
                    
                    
                      
            {

                    		
                  

                  

                    368
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name

                    		
                  

                  

                    369
                    
                    
                      
            },

                    		
                  

                  

                    370
                    !
                    
                      
            output_name = as.name(output_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    371
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    372
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    373
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    374
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    375
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    376
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create Relative risk column

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' This transformator allows the user to select a column and control group from the dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' and create a relative risk column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dataname (`character(1)`) the name of the dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' which columns will be used for possible transformation.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' `dataname` should be passed in quotes ex: `"ADSL"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param column_name (`character(1)`) field or variable from the dataset.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param control_group (`character(1)`) one of the existing level from the selected `column_name`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label_name (`character(1)`) label for the new field or variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom teal teal_transform_module

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom shiny NS tagList selectInput textInput moduleServer observe updateSelectInput reactive

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @return `teal::teal_transform_module`

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' app <- teal::init(

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = teal.data::teal_data(IRIS = iris, code = "IRIS <- iris"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   modules = teal::modules(

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'     teal::example_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'       transformators = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'         create_rel_risk_transformator("IRIS",

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'           label_name = "test",

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'           control_group = "setosa", column_name = "Species"

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'       )

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' if (interactive()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   shiny::shinyApp(app$ui, app$server)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
create_rel_risk_transformator <- function(dataname, column_name, control_group, label_name) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    !
                    
                      
  teal::teal_transform_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
    label = paste0("Relative Risk Transformator"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    !
                    
                      
    ui = function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
      ns <- NS(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
      tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    !
                    
                      
        selectInput(inputId = ns("selected_columns"), label = "Selected Variable", choices = NULL, multiple = FALSE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
        selectInput(inputId = ns("sel_cntrl_grp"), label = "Selected Control group", choices = NULL, multiple = FALSE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
        textInput(inputId = ns("col_label"), label = "Enter the Label", value = label_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
    server = function(id, data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
      moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
        # Update the column names in the selectInput

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
        observe({

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
          df <- data()[[dataname]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
          df_cols <- names(df[sapply(df, function(x) (is.factor(x) | is.character(x)))])

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
          updateSelectInput(session, "selected_columns", choices = df_cols, selected = column_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
        observe({

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
          df <- data()[[dataname]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
          levels <- levels(df[[input$selected_columns]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    !
                    
                      
          updateSelectInput(session, inputId = "sel_cntrl_grp", choices = levels, selected = control_group)

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
        # Merge the selected levels into one

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
        reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
          if (nchar(input$col_label) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
            within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
              data(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
              {

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
                df[["rrisk_header"]] <- "Risk Difference (%) (95% CI)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
                df[[col_label]] <- paste(df[[col_name]], "vs", cntrl_grp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
                ## converting the column to factor

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
                df[[col_label]] <- as.factor(df[[col_label]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
              },

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
              arm_col = as.name(input$selected_columns),

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    !
                    
                      
              col_name = input$selected_columns,

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
              cntrl_grp = input$sel_cntrl_grp,

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
              col_label = input$col_label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
              df = as.name(dataname)

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Watermark Decorator

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description `r lifecycle::badge("experimental")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A function to create a UI component for selecting watermark text

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' for plots.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Note: Currently tables are not supported

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param output_name (`character(1)`) a name for the output object (e.g., a plot or table).

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param watermark_text (`character(1)`) text to display for the watermark.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param font_size (`character(1)`) font size for the watermark text.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @return [`teal::teal_transform_module()`]

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @details The module creates a UI with `textInput` for specifying watermark text and

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' font size.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' the entered watermark text is displayed with a default `gridify` layout.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom cowplot as_grob

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom gridify gridifyLayout gridifyObject gridifyCells gridifyCell gridify set_cell

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom grDevices graphics.off

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
watermark_decorator <- function(output_name, watermark_text = "", font_size = 90) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_string(output_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    !
                    
                      
  checkmate::assert_string(watermark_text)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    !
                    
                      
  teal::teal_transform_module(

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    !
                    
                      
    label = "Watermark decorator",

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
    ui = function(id) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
      ns <- NS(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    !
                    
                      
      tagList(

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    !
                    
                      
        div(

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    !
                    
                      
          textInput(ns("txtWatermark"), label = "Enter Text", value = watermark_text),

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    !
                    
                      
          numericInput(ns("numFontsize"), label = "Enter Font size", value = font_size)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
    server = function(id, data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    !
                    
                      
      moduleServer(id, function(input, output, session) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    !
                    
                      
        reactive({

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
          req(data())

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    !
                    
                      
          res <- data()

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
          # Determine the title and footer

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    !
                    
                      
          res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
            res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
            {

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
              gridify_layout <- gridify::gridifyLayout(

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
                nrow = 3L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
                ncol = 1L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    !
                    
                      
                heights = grid::unit(c(0.05, 0.9, 0.05), "npc"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
                widths = grid::unit(1, "npc"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    !
                    
                      
                margin = grid::unit(c(t = 0.1, r = 0.1, b = 0.1, l = 0.1), units = "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
                global_gpar = grid::gpar(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
                background = grid::get.gpar()$fill,

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
                adjust_height = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
                object = gridify::gridifyObject(row = 2, col = 1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    !
                    
                      
                cells = gridify::gridifyCells(

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
                  title = gridify::gridifyCell(row = 1, col = 1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    !
                    
                      
                  footer = gridify::gridifyCell(row = 3, col = 1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    !
                    
                      
                  watermark = gridify::gridifyCell(

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
                    row = 1:3, col = 1, rot = 45,

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
                    gpar = grid::gpar(fontsize = numFontsize, alpha = 0.3)

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
                  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
                )

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
            },

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
            output_type = output_name,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
            output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
            numFontsize = input$numFontsize

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    !
                    
                      
          res <- within(

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
            res,

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
            {

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
              output_name <- gridify::gridify(

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
                object = cowplot::as_grob(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
                layout = gridify_layout

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
              ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
                gridify::set_cell("watermark", watermark_text)

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
            },

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
            output_name = as.name(output_name),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
            watermark_text = input$txtWatermark

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
        })

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
      })

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Class `BlockConditions`

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' This class represents a collection of conditions used for filtering datasets.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @section Slots:

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' \describe{

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item{\code{conditions}}{A list of conditions,

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'      where each condition is a list containing variable, operator, and value.}

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
setClass("BlockConditions", slots = list(conditions = "list"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' Add a condition to a `BlockConditions` object

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param object A `BlockConditions` object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variable A character string specifying the variable/column name.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param operator A character string specifying the operator (e.g., "==", "!=", "<", ">", "<=", ">=", "%in%", "!%in%").

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @param value The value to compare against.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @return An updated `BlockConditions` object with the new condition added.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @method add_condition BlockConditions

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
setGeneric("add_condition", function(object, variable, operator, value) standardGeneric("add_condition"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' Add conditions

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
setMethod("add_condition", "BlockConditions", function(object, variable, operator, value) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
  object@conditions <- c(object@conditions, list(list(variable = variable, operator = operator, value = value)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
  object

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
})

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' Get condition expression

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @param object A `BlockConditions` object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dataname `character(1)` The name of the dataset to filter.

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data The reactive `data` object from `teal`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @return `character(1)` The condition expression.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @method get_str_expressions BlockConditions

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    !
                    
                      
setGeneric("get_str_expression", function(object, dataname, data) standardGeneric("get_str_expression"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' Get condition expression

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
setMethod("get_str_expression", "BlockConditions", function(object, dataname, data) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    !
                    
                      
  conds <- lapply(object@conditions, function(cond) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    !
                    
                      
    var <- cond$variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    !
                    
                      
    val <- if (is.numeric(data()[[dataname]][[cond$variable]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    !
                    
                      
      cond$value

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    !
                    
                      
    } else if (isTRUE(cond$operator == "%in%" || cond$operator == "!%in%")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    !
                    
                      
      quoted_vals <- paste0(sprintf("'%s'", cond$value), collapse = ", ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    !
                    
                      
      sprintf("c(%s)", quoted_vals)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    !
                    
                      
      sprintf("'%s'", cond$value)

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    !
                    
                      
    if (cond$operator == "!%in%") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    !
                    
                      
      sprintf("!(%s %%in%% %s)", var, val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    !
                    
                      
      sprintf("%s %s %s", var, cond$operator, val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    !
                    
                      
  sprintf("(%s)", paste(conds, collapse = " & "))

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
})
